$comment: Sanitized JScholarship Solr schema fixture. Extracted from jhu-dspace-deployment schema.xml and discovery.xml. No credentials or private content.

search.resourceid.description: DSpace internal UUID for the record

search.resourcetype.description: Record type: Item, Collection, or Community

search.uniqueid.description: Primary key field for the Solr document

withdrawn.description: Withdrawal state: 'true' or 'false'. Withdrawn items must be excluded.

discoverable.description: Discoverability flag: 'true' or 'false'. Non-discoverable items are hidden from search.

latestVersion.description: Whether this is the latest version of the item. Only latest versions are shown.

database_status.description: Archive lifecycle state. Only 'ARCHIVED' items are in the live repository.

read.description: Group IDs with read permission. 'g0' = Anonymous group. Items must contain 'g0' to be publicly readable.

fulltext.description: Indexed bitstream content from ALL bundles. DISABLED for MCP — may contain restricted content (DS-3498).

search_text.description: Catchall field populated via copyField from '*'. Used for broad keyword search.

location.comm.description: Community hierarchy: community UUIDs containing this item.

location.coll.description: Collection hierarchy: collection UUIDs containing this item.

*_filter.description: Sidebar facet/filter values. Exact match, case-preserving.

*_partial.description: Partial/browse fields with text analysis (tokenization, stemming).

*_mlt.description: MoreLikeThis fields with term vectors for related-record discovery.

*_dt.description: Date fields for sorting and range filtering.

text.description: Full text analysis with folding, stemming, word splitting, and synonyms.

keywordFilter.description: Exact-match filter with trimming. Used for facets and sidebar filters.

lowerCaseSort.description: Lowercase keyword for sorting and hierarchy fields.

copyFields.description: All fields are copied to the catchall search_text field.

defaultFilterQueries: (search.resourcetype:Item AND latestVersion:true) OR search.resourcetype:Collection OR search.resourcetype:Community

abstract.note: Available as a Discovery search field for query (not a sidebar filter bean in JHU config)

fulltext.reason: Full text snippets are disabled, as snippets of embargoed/restricted bitstreams may appear in search results when the Item is public. See DS-3498.

conditions.reason: MCP returns only Items, not Collections or Communities
Only the current version is publicly discoverable
Withdrawn items have been removed from public access
Non-discoverable items are hidden from all search interfaces
Only ARCHIVED items are in the live repository; WORKFLOW/WORKSPACE items are in-progress
The 'read' field must contain 'g0' (Anonymous group ID 0) for the item to be publicly accessible

excludedCombinations: withdrawn:true — item has been withdrawn by administrator
discoverable:false — item is hidden from search/browse
database_status:WORKFLOW — item is in approval workflow
read without 'g0' — item is restricted to specific groups
